text:
Once upon an evening, young Lily dreamed about a hidden forest full of talking animals who loved storytelling. One chilly night, her pillow cloud transformed into a wise owl.

"Lily," the owl said, fluffing out its feathers. "You seek something you dream about?"

"Borrow your wisdom." Lily drifted off.

The owl perched thoughtfully. "*You cherish friendships. Your stories keep us close.*"

She dreamed again. This time her shoes transformed into eagles.

"*Fly home.*

You wish to meet your friends." The owl fluttered away.

When morning came, Lily peeked outdoors.

"Over there!"

Two fox siblings, Gus and Holly, fluttered down.

"A story, just like you!"

Together they told tales of their adventures chasing rainbows. Lily listened eagerly.

They sang.

And Lily dreamed... forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
